2606.28666.title: Why Trust Your Agent? Empirical Security Gains from TRiSM-Guided Agentic Workflows in Healthcare
2606.28666.paper_summary: Agent-based AI has enabled the automation of tasks by exposing application tools and resources to large language models (LLMs). However, to improve scope and accuracy, agents are often given access rights that exceed those of ordinary users, introducing significant security risks. AI is routinely integrated into applications with a disregard to security, risking data exposure and breaching regulations. This paper applies the AI Trust, Risk, and Security Management (TRiSM) framework to a medical report-generation application to demonstrate how an insecure agent workflow can be transformed into security-conscious agentic workflow. Both workflows were evaluated across five LLMs (Claude Haiku 4.5, GPT-4.1-nano, GPT-4.1-mini, GPT-5.4-mini, and Gemini 2.5 Flash) on two report types, totalling 800 generations and 500 attack scenarios including RAG poisoning, data-field injection, and client-side network injection. The TRiSM-guided agentic workflow reduced mean attack success rates from 31% to 10% for RAG poisoning and from 42% to 25% for data-field injection, while eliminating the network injection vector entirely through server-side prompt construction. Furthermore, report accuracy increased by 14 percentage points (72.5% to 86.5%) with the agentic workflow, demonstrating a secure design which provides more reliable outputs. This paper contributes to knowledge by demonstrating least-privilege, defence in depth agentic workflows improving security and accuracy, while also highlighting model choice is a necessary architectural consideration.
2606.28666.paper_summary_zh: 代理基於人工智慧的技術使得通過將應用工具和資源暴露給大型語言模型（LLMs）來自動化任務成為可能。<lb/>然而，為了提高範圍和準確性，代理通常被賦予超出普通用戶的訪問權限，這引入了重大安全風險。<lb/>人工智慧經常被整合到應用中，而不考慮安全性，這使得數據暴露和違反法規的風險增加。<lb/>本文將人工智慧信任、風險與安全管理（TRiSM）框架應用於醫療報告生成應用，展示如何將不安全的代理工作流程轉變為注重安全的代理工作流程。<lb/>這兩種工作流程在五個大型語言模型（Claude Haiku 4.5、GPT-4.1-nano、GPT-4.1-mini、GPT-5.4-mini 和 Gemini 2.5 Flash）上針對兩種類型的報告進行評估，總計800次生成和500個攻擊場景，包括RAG中毒、數據欄位注入和客戶端網絡注入。<lb/>TRiSM指導的代理工作流程將RAG中毒的平均攻擊成功率從31%降低到10%，將數據欄位注入的成功率從42%降低到25%，同時通過伺服器端提示構建完全消除了網絡注入向量。<lb/>此外，使用代理工作流程時，報告的準確性提高了14個百分點（從72.5%到86.5%），展示了一種安全設計，提供了更可靠的輸出。<lb/>本文通過展示最小特權、深度防禦的代理工作流程改善安全性和準確性，並強調模型選擇是必要的架構考量，為知識做出了貢獻。
2606.28666.author: Liam Kearns et.al.
